---
title: "Groundhog Day: The Musical"
subtitle: Lakewood Theatre Company
author: Bryce Britton
date: 04/01/2025
date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
image: groundhog/cover_groundhog.avif
lightbox: 
  match: auto
  effect: zoom
toc: false
page-layout: full
language: 
  title-block-author-single: "Director"
  title-block-published: "Date"
include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        h1.title {
          text-align: center;
          padding: 10px
        }
        p.subtitle {
          text-align: center;
          padding: 10px
        }
        .quarto-title-meta-heading {
          display: none;
        }
        .quarto-title-meta-contents {
          display: none;
        }
        </style>
---

## Photos

| | | |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| ![](groundhog/groundhog_1.avif){group="groundhog" .lightbox} | ![](groundhog/groundhog_2.avif){group="groundhog" .lightbox} | ![](groundhog/groundhog_3.avif){group="groundhog" .lightbox} |
| ![](groundhog/groundhog_4.avif){group="groundhog" .lightbox} | ![](groundhog/groundhog_5.avif){group="groundhog" .lightbox} | ![](groundhog/groundhog_6.avif){group="groundhog" .lightbox} |
| ![](groundhog/groundhog_7.avif){group="groundhog" .lightbox} | ![](groundhog/groundhog_8.avif){group="groundhog" .lightbox} | ![](groundhog/groundhog_9.avif){group="groundhog" .lightbox} |
| ![](groundhog/groundhog_10.avif){group="groundhog" .lightbox} | ![](groundhog/groundhog_11.avif){group="groundhog" .lightbox} | ![](groundhog/groundhog_12.avif){group="groundhog" .lightbox} |

: {.custom-table}
